name: file-info-explorer
description: Shows last modified dates and sticky notes for files and folders in the Explorer.

fileInfo.showDateOnHover.description: Show the last modified date in the tooltip when hovering over files and folders in the Explorer.

fileInfo.timeZoneOffset.description: Time zone used for modified timestamps. Use system for the current OS time zone, or choose a fixed UTC offset like UTC+8.

fileInfo.showFolderSize.description: Show recursive folder size in the File Info panel.

fileInfo.showImageDimensions.description: Show image dimensions for supported image files.

fileInfo.showCsvRows.description: Show CSV/TSV row counts for reasonably small files.

fileInfo.showFolderCounts.description: Show immediate file and folder counts for folders.

fileInfo.showFolderDetails.description: Show recursive folder details like largest and newest child file. Disabled by default because it can be expensive in large folders.

fileInfo.showCreatedTime.description: Show file or folder creation time.

fileInfo.showAccessedTime.description: Show last accessed time. Disabled by default because access times can be noisy.

fileInfo.showFileType.description: Show detected file type and extension.

fileInfo.showMimeType.description: Show MIME type when it can be inferred from the file extension.

fileInfo.showPermissions.description: Show simple permission hints such as read-only or executable.

fileInfo.showSymlinkTarget.description: Show the target of symbolic links.

fileInfo.showLineCount.description: Show text file line counts for reasonably small files.

fileInfo.showEncoding.description: Show basic encoding detection such as UTF-8 or binary.

fileInfo.showNewline.description: Show detected newline style such as LF or CRLF.

fileInfo.showHash.description: Show a short SHA-256 hash for files up to 10 MB.

fileInfo.showGitStatus.description: Show Git status such as clean, modified, staged, or untracked.

fileInfo.showGitLastCommit.description: Show the latest Git commit summary for the file. Disabled by default because it runs an extra Git query.

fileInfo.showGitIgnored.description: Show when a file is ignored by Git.

fileInfo.showTodoCount.description: Show TODO and FIXME counts in text files.

fileInfo.showPackageVersion.description: Show the version field for package.json files.

fileInfo.showJsonInfo.description: Show JSON validity and top-level object or array size.

fileInfo.showMarkdownInfo.description: Show Markdown heading, link, and image counts.

fileInfo.showNoteBadge.description: Show a ✎ badge on files and folders that have a note.

enumDescriptions: card — sectioned layout with dividers and headers
fileInfo.tooltipStyle.description: Visual layout style for file info tooltips. Note: tooltip position (left/right/above/below) is controlled by the IDE based on available screen space and cannot be set by extensions.
